name: Whole Roasted Fois Gras
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Season the fois gras with salt and pepper.
3. In a smoking hot sauté pan, sear the fois gras for 2-3 minutes on both sides or until seared all over. Remove any excess fat if needed; set aside.
4. Add the shallots to the fois gras.
5. Place directly in the oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, basting every five minutes.
